items.title: Update Node Types to Latest Version in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps the @types/node package from version 25.9.2 to 25.9.3. The changes include minor updates that enhance type definitions, ensuring better compatibility and performance. This will help maintain the stability and reliability of the frontend codebase.

items.title: Update TypeScript ESLint Parser to Latest Version in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This PR updates the @typescript-eslint/parser package from version 8.61.0 to 8.61.1. The new version includes several bug fixes that enhance the functionality of the ESLint plugin, ensuring better handling of comments and type assertions. This update aims to improve code quality and maintainability in the project.
